recommended_skills.name: tdd
recommended_skills.description: Enforce test-driven development workflow. Scaffold interfaces, generate tests FIRST, then implement minimal code to pass. Ensure 80%+ coverage.
recommended_skills.reason: Flutter/Dart TDD with widget tests, unit tests, integration tests. Language-agnostic TDD skill is the best fit since no Dart-specific TDD skill exists.

recommended_skills.name: e2e
recommended_skills.description: Generate and run end-to-end tests with Playwright. Creates test journeys, runs tests, captures screenshots/videos/traces.
recommended_skills.reason: Flutter integration testing and UI automation. Playwright itself targets web, but the E2E methodology applies to Flutter driver/integration_test.

recommended_skills.name: code-review
recommended_skills.description: Code Review for general code changes.
recommended_skills.reason: Language-agnostic code review applicable to Dart/Flutter PRs. No Dart-specific reviewer exists.

recommended_skills.name: security-review
recommended_skills.description: Comprehensive security checklist for authentication, user input, secrets, API endpoints, and payment features.
recommended_skills.reason: Firebase auth, Firestore security rules, API key management, and secure storage are critical in mobile apps.

recommended_skills.name: plan
recommended_skills.description: Restate requirements, assess risks, and create step-by-step implementation plan. WAIT for user CONFIRM before touching any code.
recommended_skills.reason: Feature planning for Flutter apps - screen flows, state management, Firebase integration points.

recommended_skills.name: api-design
recommended_skills.description: REST API design patterns including resource naming, status codes, pagination, filtering, error responses, versioning, and rate limiting.
recommended_skills.reason: Firebase Cloud Functions REST endpoints, external API integration patterns for mobile clients.

recommended_skills.name: investigate
recommended_skills.description: Systematic debugging with root cause investigation. Four phases: investigate, analyze, hypothesize, implement.
recommended_skills.reason: Debugging Flutter widget rendering, state management bugs, Firebase connection issues. Universal debugging methodology.

recommended_skills.name: tdd-workflow
recommended_skills.description: Enforces test-driven development with 80%+ coverage including unit, integration, and E2E tests.
recommended_skills.reason: Extended TDD workflow with coverage enforcement. Useful when tdd skill is too lightweight for complex Flutter features.

recommended_skills.name: coding-standards
recommended_skills.description: Universal coding standards, best practices, and patterns for TypeScript, JavaScript, React, and Node.js development.
recommended_skills.reason: Some patterns transfer to Dart, but primarily JS/TS focused. Useful for Firebase Cloud Functions (Node.js).

recommended_skills.name: deployment-patterns
recommended_skills.description: Deployment workflows, CI/CD pipeline patterns, Docker containerization, health checks, rollback strategies.
recommended_skills.reason: CI/CD for Flutter builds (fastlane, Codemagic, GitHub Actions), Firebase Hosting/Functions deployment.

recommended_skills.name: docker-patterns
recommended_skills.description: Docker and Docker Compose patterns for local development, container security, networking, and multi-service orchestration.
recommended_skills.reason: Docker for Firebase emulator suite, CI build environments for Flutter. Not core mobile dev but useful for local dev setup.

recommended_skills.name: frontend-patterns
recommended_skills.description: Frontend development patterns for React, Next.js, state management, performance optimization, and UI best practices.
recommended_skills.reason: State management concepts (BLoC, Riverpod parallels), component composition, and performance optimization transfer to Flutter widget architecture.

recommended_skills.name: verify
recommended_skills.reason: Pre-commit verification: flutter analyze, flutter test, build checks before declaring work complete.

recommended_skills.name: ship
recommended_skills.description: Ship workflow: merge main, run tests, review diff, bump VERSION, update CHANGELOG, commit, push, create PR.
recommended_skills.reason: Release workflow for Flutter apps - version bumping in pubspec.yaml, changelog, PR creation.

recommended_skills.name: search-first
recommended_skills.description: Research-before-coding workflow. Search for existing tools, libraries, and patterns before writing custom code.
recommended_skills.reason: Critical for Flutter ecosystem - finding pub.dev packages, Firebase extensions, community solutions before building custom.
